input_description.intro:
Purpose of postahc.x:
- Read the electron-phonon quantities calculated by ph.x with the electron_phonon='ahc' option.
- Calculate the phonon-induced electron self-energy in the full matrix form at a given temperature.
Structure of the input data: ========================================================================
&INPUT ...specs of namelist variables... /

var.name: prefix
var.info: Prepended to input/output filenames; must be the same used in the calculation of unperturbed system.

var.name: outdir
ahc_dir
var.info: Directory where the binary files are located.

var.name: use_irr_q
var.info: If .true., assume that the q points are on the irreducible grid. In this case, the data in ahc_dir must have been actually generated from a calculation on an irreducible q grid. Off-diagonal self-energies cannot be computed if use_irr_q = .true.

var.name: ahc_nbnd
var.info: Number of bands for which the electron self-energy is to be computed. Must be identical to ahc_nbnd of the ph.x run with electron_phonon='ahc'.

var.name: ahc_nbndskip
var.info: Number of bands to exclude when computing the self-energy. Must be identical to ahc_nbndskip of the ph.x run with electron_phonon='ahc'.

var.name: flvec
var.info: File containing the normalized phonon displacements written by matdyn.x.

var.name: eta_eV
var.info: Magnitude of the small imaginary component included to smooth the energy denominators.

var.name: temp_kelvin
var.info: Temperature at which the electron self-energy is calculated.

var.name: ahc_win_min_eV
var.info: Lower bound of active AHC window for the lower Fan term.

var.name: ahc_win_max_eV
var.info: Upper bound of active AHC window for the lower Fan term.

var.name: skip_upper
var.info: If .true., skip calculation of the upper Fan self-energy. Also, truncate the Debye-Waller self-energy to include only the low-energy band contribution. (Corresponds to the second term (lower Fan + lower DW) of Eq. (G1-revised) of J.-M. Lihm and C.-H. Park, PRX 12, 039901(E) (2022).) If .false., calculate the contribution of both the high-energy and low-energy bands. In this case, ahc_upfan_iq#.bin files must be present in ahc_dir.

var.name: skip_dw
var.info: If .true., skip calculation of the Debye-Waller self-energy. If .false., ahc_dw.bin file must be present in ahc_dir.

var.name: adiabatic
var.info: If .true., use the adiabatic approximation when computing the Fan self-energy by ignoring the phonon frequency in the denominator. This approximation is known to be inaccurate and even divergent in some materials (S. PoncÃ© et al., J. Chem. Phys. 143, 102813 (2015)). Therefore, this keyword should be used only for experimental or debugging purposes.
